title: pityrogramma lehmannii
intro: Pityrogramma lehmannii, also known as the Bird's Nest Fern, is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pityrogramma lehmannii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
